payload.claim_text: This map illustrates the Bronx SBS Corridors, featuring the Bx41 and Bx12 routes. The Bx41 route is shown in dark purple, and the Bx12 route is shown in light blue. Both routes are marked with SBS stations (purple circles with a white plus sign) and subway connections (green circles with numbers 2 and 5). The map also shows the MTA Metro-North Connection (black circles with the MTA logo) at several points. The routes are labeled with their respective line numbers and types (e.g., 41 SBS, 12 LOC).

payload.description: Bronx SBS Corridors featuring the Bx41 and Bx12 routes
